releaseNotes:
Release v0.10.0

New Features:
- Preset shelf (PS-162)
- Live thinking and tool status feedback in the AI assistant (PS-145)
- Stream model reasoning as thinking deltas, with live reasoning tail in the assistant status line
- Password reset and change password (PS-167, PS-168)

Bug Fixes:
- Surface trigger start failures instead of logging silently (PS-161)
- Surface dead triggers on list/MCP surfaces and in Docker sidecar mode
- Execution state hardening (PS-159)
- AI assistant stability fixes: splitter scope, status restore, robust 400-retry, redacted blocks

Improvements:
- Themed scrollbar for the assistant reasoning pane
